capabilities.name: Strategy
capabilities.summary: Frame the decision, its alternatives, constraints, and accountable owner before selecting an instrument.

capabilities.name: Data
capabilities.summary: Keep sources, observation dates, update cadence, and missing-data handling visible beside the output.

capabilities.name: Intelligence
capabilities.summary: Turn sourced observations into bounded assessments with methodology and limitations available for inspection.

capabilities.name: Forecasting
capabilities.summary: Publish probabilistic, time-bound, independently scoreable outlooks only under the governed evaluation standard.

insights.title: Forecast evaluation protocol
insights.summary: The public protocol defines preregistration, baselines, time-aware validation, scoring, and limitations before performance claims can be released.

insights.title: Claims policy
insights.summary: Public comparative language requires an approved evidence record; unqualified superlatives are not released.

insights.title: Brand and endorsement architecture
insights.summary: The masterbrand, product relationships, approved marks, and SDCofA endorsement are governed as explicit public contracts.
